events.title: 3 Days OSHO Meditation Camp
events.description: Transformative 3-day OSHO meditation camp guided by certified facilitator Moksha
events.full_text:
3 Days OSHO Meditation Camp

Dates: 9th October - 14th October 2026
Time: 11th 4pm - 14th 4pm
Location: Tiruvannamali

Experience a transformative 3-day OSHO meditation camp, starting on 9th October. Guided by certified facilitator Moksha, this retreat offers a deep meditative experience.
